title: auto responser
body:
# Auto Responser AI auto responser
> the service in use may be free of charge # description the mod automatically responds to messages addressed to you, but the response is created by AI ([openrouter API](https://openrouter.ai/docs/api-reference/overview)), you will need to specify your API key, below is the instruction on how to set up the mod works in the client environment and sends messages on your behalf mod is configured through integration with [modmenu](https://modrinth.com/project/mOgUt4GM), and the setting for the key to cancel the response (see below) is in the control settings for all other keys ## to start 1. get api key on [openrouter.ai](https://openrouter.ai/settings/keys) and set in mod settings 2. **(unessentially)** select a model on [free models list](https://openrouter.ai/models?max_price=0) `and set in mod settings` ## how does it work? 1. receives messages from the chat 2. if the message contains one of your nickname variations the code will start the waiting process for the selected time 3. if you haven't canceled the process in any way during this time (you can cancel by opening the chat orYou can cancel by opening the chat or pressing the cancel pressing the cancel key), a request request will be sent to the API and the response on your behalf will be sent to the chat enjoy using it :)
